examples: They would not be devoured by this gorgon of the East.
I asked him what it was and he told me that it was Medusa, the Gorgon.
The Gorgon project is one of the world's largest proposed gas developments.
While he concedes nothing can stop Gorgon from being built, he insists environmental practices can improve.
America is about to deploy drones equipped with a surveillance system called Gorgon Stare.
